description_long: This house complex features three distinct modern residences arranged side by side, each with flat roofs, large windows, and a mix of white, black, and green exterior finishes. The facades are characterized by clean lines, geometric forms, and integrated landscaping, including small trees and shrubs. Outdoor living spaces such as patios and terraces are visible, some furnished with tables and chairs, and one house includes a rooftop garden. The windows are generously sized, providing ample natural light and a contemporary aesthetic. The property is enclosed by a combination of low fences and walls, with paved walkways and driveways leading to the entrances. The overall design emphasizes modern minimalism, open spaces, and a strong connection between indoor and outdoor environments.
description: A trio of modern, flat-roofed houses with large windows, geometric forms, and landscaped outdoor areas, enclosed by fences and walls. The design features clean lines, open patios, and a mix of white, black, and green finishes.
description_view_0: Front view showing three modern houses with patios, large windows, and landscaped entryways, highlighting the main entrances and outdoor seating areas.
description_view_1: Rear view displaying the backyards, rooftop garden, and the overall depth of the property, with visible greenery and pool area.
description_view_2: Side view emphasizing the length of the property, the arrangement of fences, and the distribution of windows and greenery along the sides.
description_view_3: Opposite rear view showing the rooftops, terraces, and the spatial relationship between the three houses, with visible outdoor features and landscaping.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryways feature modern doors, some with small porches or overhangs, and are accessed via paved walkways with integrated landscaping.
